sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
green = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'N']
print(f"Green blocks: {len(green)}")

green_positions = []
for g in green:
    b = g['boundary']
    min_r = min(pt[0] for pt in b)
    min_c = min(pt[1] for pt in b)
    green_positions.append((min_r, min_c))
green_positions.sort()
print(f"Green positions: {green_positions}")

# Player position
player = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'b']
if player:
    pb = player[0]['boundary']
    min_r = min(pt[0] for pt in pb)
    min_c = min(pt[1] for pt in pb)
    print(f"Player: ({min_r}, {min_c})")

print(f"Last result: game_over={last_action_result.get('game_over', False)}, level_completed={last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}, done={last_action_result.get('done', False)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
